The '''''Vindicator''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] vessel that was stationed in the space beyond [[Ammuud/Legends|Ammuud]].

==Characteristics==
A large flight deck stretched from bow to stern on top of the vessel's superstructure, with a smaller "island" off to the port side; the deck itself was completely exposed to the vacuum of space. From here, [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] could depart in formation, while arriving craft would land and be brought down to the inner decks on elevator platforms. The ship's compliment included squadrons of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing starfighters]] and [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor|A-9 interceptors]].

==History==
The ''Vindicator'' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] and rallying-point of a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] whose aim was to capture the last reincarnation of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and bring him to justice.

==Behind the scenes==
The ship itself bears a strong resemblance to a [[Wikipedia:World War II|World War II]] [[Wikipedia:aircraft carrier|aircraft carrier]], both in appearance and basic operation.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]]
